title: github.com.argoproj.argo_events.pkg.apis.events.v1alpha1.TLSConfig
description: TLSConfig refers to TLS configuration for a client.

caCertSecret.title: CACertSecret refers to the secret that contains the CA cert

clientCertSecret.title: ClientCertSecret refers to the secret that contains the client cert

clientKeySecret.title: ClientKeySecret refers to the secret that contains the client key

enabled.title:
Enabled indicates if TLS is enabled. Added for compatibility proposes for Brokers that needs TLS without key authentication
+optional

insecureSkipVerify.title:
If true, skips creation of TLSConfig with certs and creates an empty TLSConfig. (Defaults to false)
+optional
